## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

**Input (the resume text and/or job description):**

```text
Paste the input that triggers the bug here.
```

**Code:**

```typescript
// Code that reproduces the issue
```

**Expected behavior:**

What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior:**

What actually happened. Include the actual score/result if applicable.

## Environment

- Library version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.0]
- Browser (if applicable): [e.g. Chrome 120]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Screenshots welcome if relevant.
